name: I had asthma before, can I still claim new lung damage from work solvents?
description: Yes, covers aggravation; prove worsening via doctor.

mainEntity.name: I had asthma before, can I still claim new lung damage from work solvents?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, covers aggravation; prove worsening via doctor.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, if exposure aggravated or caused new harm, per medical proof.**

Workers' comp covers aggravation of pre-existing conditions[2][8]. Doctor must differentiate work-related worsening[3].

- Baseline records help.
- Objective tests like spirometry.
- No need to prove sole cause.

Get specialist evaluation; attorney argues apportionment. Viable with strong MD opinion[8].
